userStories.title: Wire starter-ceremony dialog triggers end-to-end
userStories.description: As a player, I want completing the jan Sewi starter ceremony to actually grant my chosen creature and items, so that the opening tutorial has real consequences.
acceptanceCriteria: After jan_sewi tutorial dialog closes, TokiSave.party() contains soweli_seli @ L5
Flag starter_chosen=true is set and persists across save/load

userStories.title: Let player pick from 3 starters (seli/telo/kasi)
userStories.description: As a player, I want to choose between three starter creatures during the ceremony, so that I can pick a play style.
acceptanceCriteria: jan Sewi dialog offers 3 lettered choices (seli / telo / kasi)
Selecting a choice dispatches add_party with the picked species only
Untouched species do not appear in party

userStories.title: Read from party instead of hardcoded DEFAULT_LEAD_SPECIES
userStories.description: As a player, I want my chosen starter to be the one that appears in encounters, not a hardcoded debug species.
acceptanceCriteria: EncounterWatcher._on_player_arrived uses TokiSave.party()[0] when party non-empty
Falls back to DEFAULT_LEAD_SPECIES only when party is empty

userStories.title: Populate nasin_wan tall-grass encounter table
userStories.description: As a player, I want walking through tall grass in nasin_wan to trigger varied wild encounters, so that the route feels alive.
acceptanceCriteria: Encounters fire when player walks across tall_grass tiles

userStories.title: Add tall-grass tile painting to nasin_wan ground layer
userStories.description: As a player, I want to see tall-grass tiles painted in the world so I can avoid or seek encounters.
acceptanceCriteria: ≥ 20 tiles tagged tall_grass visible in nasin_wan grid
Tiles painted with forest_summer foliage atlas

userStories.title: Author jan Ike rival set-piece at nasin_wan east edge
userStories.description: As a player, I want a scripted rival fight when I reach the east edge of nasin_wan, so that the route has a story beat.
acceptanceCriteria: Stepping on tile (30,5) triggers a forced non-random battle
Trigger fires only once per save

userStories.title: Create FieldTriggerWatcher for non-warp scripted tile triggers
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a clean separation between warp triggers and scripted-event triggers, so that set-pieces and dialogs are easy to author.
acceptanceCriteria: Fires FieldEvents.combat_triggered or dialog_requested based on region.triggers[] data

userStories.title: Fix combat → field return so player lands on pre-combat tile
userStories.description: As a player, I want to return to exactly where I was after a battle ends, so that combat doesn't feel disorienting.
acceptanceCriteria: Player Gamepiece resumes at the pre-combat cell

userStories.title: Apply XP + level-up on combat victory
userStories.description: As a player, I want my creatures to gain XP and level up after winning fights, so that progression feels rewarding.
acceptanceCriteria: Crossing a curve threshold triggers level up
Level up recomputes max HP and learns moves per species curve

userStories.title: Apply faint → whiteout → restore party at last village
userStories.description: As a player, I want a clear defeat sequence that returns me to safety, so that losing is not a softlock.
acceptanceCriteria: Player warps to TokiSave.current_region_id spawn point

userStories.title: Flee action in combat UI for wild battles
userStories.description: As a player, I want to flee from wild battles, so that I can retreat from unwanted fights.
acceptanceCriteria: Flee button in action menu (wild battles only)
On success, combat ends with is_player_victory=false and no faint whiteout

userStories.title: Swap toki_town_main.tscn to use forest_summer tileset for nasin_wan
userStories.description: As a player, I want nasin_wan to look like a forest, not a town, so that biomes feel distinct.
acceptanceCriteria: ma_tomo_lili continues to use Kenney town atlas

userStories.title: Build forest_summer tileset resource with walkable + tall_grass flags
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a complete forest_summer TileSet with collision and tag metadata, so that field systems can resolve tile types.
acceptanceCriteria: TileKeys.resolve('tall_grass') returns valid atlas coord from forest_summer
Walkable flag honored by Gamepiece pathing

userStories.title: Sanity playthrough checklist for slice
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a documented manual playthrough script, so that I can verify the slice end-to-end before merging Phase 1.
acceptanceCriteria: Checklist executes cleanly with make build && make run

userStories.title: Theme combat UI with toki_theme.tres
userStories.description: As a player, I want combat to look like the rest of the game, so that the experience feels cohesive.

userStories.title: Animate HP bars with tween on damage
userStories.description: As a player, I want HP bars to animate when I take damage, so that combat feels responsive.
acceptanceCriteria: Bar color shifts green→amber at 50% HP
Bar color shifts amber→red at 20% HP

userStories.title: Damage number popups with type-matchup color
userStories.description: As a player, I want to see floating damage numbers colored by effectiveness, so that I learn type matchups visually.
acceptanceCriteria: Damage labels float up and fade out

userStories.title: Swap battler sprites to creature packs per species
userStories.description: As a player, I want each species to have a distinct battle sprite, so that creatures feel unique.
acceptanceCriteria: Each SpeciesResource.sprite_frame maps to an asset in assets/creatures/
In-combat sprite is distinct per species (no shared placeholder)

userStories.title: Battler hit animation (shake + flash)
userStories.description: As a player, I want creatures to react when hit, so that damage feels impactful.
acceptanceCriteria: On taking damage, sprite shakes for 0.15s

userStories.title: Faint animation (fade + slide down)
userStories.description: As a player, I want a clear faint animation when a creature reaches 0 HP.
acceptanceCriteria: Sprite fades to 0 alpha during drop

userStories.title: Victory + level-up + XP gain popup sequence
userStories.description: As a player, I want a satisfying end-of-battle sequence showing XP, level-ups, and new moves.

userStories.title: Defeat screen panel
userStories.description: As a player, I want a clear defeat message before being returned to the village.
acceptanceCriteria: Full-screen fade with message 'pakala! sina tawa ma tomo.'

userStories.title: Catch UX with poki-throw animation + result dialog
userStories.description: As a player, I want a tactile catch sequence with animation and clear result feedback.
acceptanceCriteria: Throwing a poki plays a sprite-arc animation
On fail, wild creature gets next turn

userStories.title: Party Panel scene with 6 slots
userStories.description: As a player, I want to view my party from the field via a hotkey.
acceptanceCriteria: Pressing P on field opens panel overlay
Panel shows 6 slots with sprite, name_tp (sitelen-pona), HP bar, level

userStories.title: Party Panel detail view with moves/XP/type
userStories.description: As a player, I want to inspect each creature's moves, XP progress, and type.
acceptanceCriteria: Tapping a slot shows detail card
Card displays 4 moves, type badge, XP progress bar

userStories.title: Party Panel reorder via drag
userStories.description: As a player, I want to drag a creature to slot 0 to set my new lead.
acceptanceCriteria: Drag any slot to position 0 to reorder

userStories.title: Reward item + XP drop table per species
userStories.description: As a developer, I want each species to define its XP yield and item drop chance.
acceptanceCriteria: SpeciesResource has xp_yield and optional item_drop_chance fields

userStories.title: Add kili healing item usable from party panel
userStories.description: As a player, I want to heal injured creatures with kili from the party panel.
acceptanceCriteria: From party panel, tapping a creature offers 'use kili'
Works on fainted or injured creatures

userStories.title: Items submenu in combat action menu
userStories.description: As a player, I want to use items mid-fight from a clear submenu.
acceptanceCriteria: Action menu has Fight / Poki / Item / Flee

userStories.title: Title scene with new game / continue / settings / quit
userStories.description: As a player, I want a real title screen instead of booting straight into gameplay.
acceptanceCriteria: Menu routes to game, settings, or quit

userStories.title: Hook SaveSystem.save() to autosave on region change
userStories.description: As a player, I want the game to autosave when I cross between regions.
acceptanceCriteria: Save file at user://save_data.sav (SaveSystem addon default)

userStories.title: Autosave on combat_finished
userStories.description: As a player, I want progress saved after every battle so a crash doesn't lose XP.
acceptanceCriteria: Save flushes after every combat end (win or loss)

userStories.title: Save on WM_CLOSE_REQUEST
userStories.description: As a player, I want closing the window to persist my state.
acceptanceCriteria: Next launch + Continue restores full state
Files: new src/common/app_root.gd, project.godot notification wiring

userStories.title: Continue boots into current_region_id at player_tile
userStories.description: As a player, I want Continue to drop me exactly where I left off.
acceptanceCriteria: Continue loads save, builds region, places player on last tile

userStories.title: Settings menu for Music / SFX volume + Text speed
userStories.description: As a player, I want to adjust audio levels and text speed and have those settings persist.
acceptanceCriteria: Three sliders: Music, SFX, Text speed
Text speed applied to DialogOverlay TYPEWRITER_CPS

userStories.title: Loading screen between region warps
userStories.description: As a player, I want a smooth transition with the destination region's name during warps.
acceptanceCriteria: Transition covers, hides old region, async builds new, then clears
Shows region name_tp as label during transition

userStories.title: New Game flow with confirm-wipe modal
userStories.description: As a player, I want to be warned before a New Game overwrites my existing save.
acceptanceCriteria: New Game with existing save shows 'are you sure?' modal
Confirming deletes save, then runs starter ceremony

userStories.title: Pause menu with Resume / Party / Items / Save / Settings / Quit
userStories.description: As a player, I want to pause the game and access common actions.
acceptanceCriteria: ESC or start-button opens pause menu

userStories.title: Sync current_region_id + player_tile in field
userStories.description: As a developer, I want save state to track player position continuously.

userStories.title: Save format versioning + migration stub
userStories.description: As a developer, I want save files to carry a version so future migrations are possible.
acceptanceCriteria: Load checks version and warns on mismatch

userStories.title: Credits scene rolls on game clear
userStories.description: As a player, I want a credits sequence after beating the final jan lawa.
acceptanceCriteria: Credits roll for 25s after final victory

userStories.title: Mastered words screen
userStories.description: As a player, I want to review the toki pona sentences I've encountered.
acceptanceCriteria: Pause → Mastered Words shows scrollable list
Each entry shows EN + TP + first-heard region

userStories.title: Extend RegionResource with biome + music_track
userStories.description: As a developer, I want regions to declare their biome and music so builders can pick the right tileset and track.
acceptanceCriteria: Builder reads biome to pick tileset

userStories.title: Author nasin_wan biome=forest using forest_summer tileset
userStories.description: As a player, I want nasin_wan to fully use the forest biome.

userStories.title: Author nasin_pi_telo biome=water with custom water atlas
userStories.description: As a player, I want a river-route region with proper water tiles.

userStories.title: Author ma_telo biome=town as second village
userStories.description: As a player, I want a second village hub with NPCs and the first gym.
acceptanceCriteria: Village hub contains jan Telo (gym 1), 3 NPCs, 1 shop-sign NPC, 2 warps

userStories.title: Author ma_lete biome=ice using forest_winter tileset
userStories.description: As a player, I want an ice region painted with frozen-forest tiles.

userStories.title: Author nena_sewi biome=peak (upper mountain)
userStories.description: As a player, I want a peak region housing the final gym.

userStories.title: Author nena_suli biome=cave using cave tileset
userStories.description: As a player, I want a cave-interior region with appropriate visuals.
acceptanceCriteria: Cave interior painted with cave tileset

userStories.title: Verify all 7 region warp graph is connected
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a test that catches any orphaned region in the warp graph.
acceptanceCriteria: gdUnit4 test walks warps from start

userStories.title: Author 7 jan lawa set-piece fights
userStories.description: As a player, I want one gym leader fight per region with a real multi-creature party.
acceptanceCriteria: Each jan lawa is scripted via FieldTriggerWatcher
First fight at ma_telo, last at nena_sewi
Each has a multi-creature party scaled to region

userStories.title: Badge award dialog + persist badges[]
userStories.description: As a player, I want a ceremony when I beat a gym leader and a badge that persists.
acceptanceCriteria: On jan lawa win, ceremony dialog plays

userStories.title: Badge display in pause menu (7 slots)
userStories.description: As a player, I want to see my badge collection.
acceptanceCriteria: Earned badges shown with sitelen-pona titles

userStories.title: Gate next-region warps until matching badge earned
userStories.description: As a player, I want gym progression to gate region access for clear pacing.
acceptanceCriteria: Stepping on a gated warp without badge shows 'you need X badge' dialog

userStories.title: Pokedex screen — 17 species grid
userStories.description: As a player, I want a Pokedex showing my discovery and catch progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Silhouette → revealed on seen → full art on caught
Each entry shows name_tp + type + flavor text

userStories.title: Track bestiary entries (seen/caught) on encounter + catch
userStories.description: As a developer, I want seen/caught flags written when encounters open and catches succeed.
acceptanceCriteria: Seen flag set on encounter open
Caught flag set on poki success

userStories.title: Author multi-beat dialog for all regions (≥ 5 NPCs each)
userStories.description: As a player, I want every region to have NPCs with flavor and story dialog.
acceptanceCriteria: ≥ 35 region-NPC dialog nodes total across regions

userStories.title: Shop NPC in ma_telo sells poki + kili
userStories.description: As a player, I want to buy items from a shop NPC.
acceptanceCriteria: Interacting with shop NPC opens menu of items + price in ma
Buying decrements ma and increments inventory

userStories.title: Add ma (coin) inventory + win-reward currency
userStories.description: As a player, I want to earn coins from battles to spend at shops.
acceptanceCriteria: Each battle grants small coin reward

userStories.title: Wire Music autoload to region biome → track map
userStories.description: As a player, I want each biome to play its own music.

userStories.title: Cross-fade music on region change
userStories.description: As a player, I want music to transition smoothly between biomes.
acceptanceCriteria: 0.8s cross-fade between tracks on biome change

userStories.title: Combat music override
userStories.description: As a player, I want a distinct combat track that returns to field music after.
acceptanceCriteria: Combat.setup() fades out field music + plays combat.mp3
Field music restores on combat finish

userStories.title: Wire 12 SFX events via AdaptiSound
userStories.description: As a player, I want sound effects on every key action so the game feels reactive.
acceptanceCriteria: 12 events wired: footstep, encounter sting, hit, miss, faint, catch-success, catch-fail, menu move, menu select, dialog beep, warp whoosh, gym-victory + badge
All play correct .ogg at SFX bus

userStories.title: Apply Settings volume sliders to Music + SFX buses
userStories.description: As a player, I want volume sliders to control audio in real time.
acceptanceCriteria: Slider movement live-adjusts bus volume in dB

userStories.title: Virtual d-pad UI for mobile
userStories.description: As a mobile player, I want an on-screen d-pad to move my character.

userStories.title: Virtual A/B action buttons for mobile
userStories.description: As a mobile player, I want on-screen interact and back buttons.
acceptanceCriteria: Route to interact and back actions

userStories.title: Enforce ≥ 44dp touch targets in all UI
userStories.description: As a mobile player, I want comfortably tappable buttons everywhere.
acceptanceCriteria: gdUnit4 test scans scenes and asserts compliance

userStories.title: Lock screen rotation to portrait for Android
userStories.description: As a mobile player, I want the game to stay in portrait orientation.

userStories.title: Apply text-speed slider to typewriter + combat log
userStories.description: As a player, I want my text-speed setting to affect all text rendering.

userStories.title: Color-contrast AA audit on theme
userStories.description: As a player with low vision, I want text and UI chrome to meet WCAG AA contrast.
acceptanceCriteria: All body text + UI chrome passes 4.5:1 contrast on measured samples

userStories.title: Accessible mode toggle
userStories.description: As a player who needs accessibility accommodations, I want a single toggle for larger fonts and reduced motion.

userStories.title: Web export ARIA landmarks + HTML title + meta description
userStories.description: As a web player, I want the page to be accessible and discoverable.
acceptanceCriteria: HTML5 preset uses custom shell with semantic landmarks

userStories.title: Tutorial overlay on first boot
userStories.description: As a new player, I want movement, interact, and pause hints on first boot.
acceptanceCriteria: First 30s of fresh save show hint arrows + 'WASD / [E] / [ESC]'

userStories.title: Create test/ dir with gdUnit4 manifest
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a working gdUnit4 setup before writing tests.

userStories.title: Unit test — schemas load all spine JSONs without error
userStories.description: As a developer, I want CI to catch any malformed spine JSON.

userStories.title: Unit test — build_spine emits .tres for all content
userStories.description: As a developer, I want CI to verify the builder produces every expected artifact.

userStories.title: Unit test — encounter-roll weighted distribution
userStories.description: As a developer, I want statistical confidence in the encounter table.
acceptanceCriteria: 10,000 rolls across 4-species table within 3% of weights

userStories.title: Unit test — type-matchup matrix
userStories.description: As a developer, I want every type pairing verified.
acceptanceCriteria: 25 cases (seli/telo/kasi/lete/wawa pairings) each return expected multiplier

userStories.title: Unit test — catch math at full, half, and 1HP
userStories.description: As a developer, I want catch probabilities verified at edge cases.

userStories.title: Unit test — XP curve + level-up at boundaries
userStories.description: As a developer, I want level-up math verified at curve thresholds.

userStories.title: Integration test — warp graph connectivity (merged into US-050)
userStories.description: Folded into US-050 to avoid duplicate accounting on the same test/integration/test_warp_graph.gd. Kept as a no-op placeholder so numbering stays stable.
acceptanceCriteria: US-050 is the authoritative story for warp-graph test coverage
This entry auto-passes when US-050 passes

userStories.title: Integration test — save round-trip
userStories.description: As a developer, I want CI to verify save/load preserves all state.
acceptanceCriteria: Save current state → clear memory → load

userStories.title: Integration test — full scripted playthrough (headless)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want CI to run a scripted full playthrough.
acceptanceCriteria: Injects key events: walk → starter → warp → encounter → win → gym1 win

userStories.title: Android gradle_build preset enabled + signed
userStories.description: As a release engineer, I want signed AABs produced from CI.
acceptanceCriteria: export_presets.cfg Android preset has use_gradle_build=true, export_format=1 (AAB)

userStories.title: release-please + CD uploads AAB + APK + web zip
userStories.description: As a release engineer, I want every tag to publish all platform artifacts.
acceptanceCriteria: release.yml exports all platforms on tag push
Attaches AAB, APK, web zip to GH release

userStories.title: Web HTML5 export size audit + compression
userStories.description: As a web player, I want the build to load fast (≤ 30MB compressed).

userStories.title: Asset compression pass (ETC2/ASTC + WebP)
userStories.description: As a release engineer, I want texture sizes reduced for mobile + web.

userStories.title: Expand CI matrix — unit + integration + schema + web-size gate
userStories.description: As a developer, I want CI to run all jobs in parallel and gate the merge.

userStories.title: Enforce Conventional Commits via commitlint
userStories.description: As a release engineer, I want non-conformant PR titles to fail CI.

userStories.title: Write CHANGELOG.md prelude + tag v0.1.0 via release-please
userStories.description: As a release engineer, I want a clean changelog and tagged v0.1.0 release.

userStories.title: Smoke-test signed APK on physical Pixel + iOS web browser
userStories.description: As a release engineer, I want manual QA sign-off before promoting v0.1.0.
